summary: Two-AC fix: (AC1) submit button disabled at zero balance on order-entry; (AC2) Long/Short CTAs restored on market-detail at zero balance.

before_after_pairs.label: Submit button state with 0.00 USDC balance
before_after_pairs.note: Before: 'Add funds' button is enabled (tappable). After: 'Add funds' button is disabled (opacity reduced, not tappable).

before_after_pairs.label: Market-detail page with 0.00 USDC balance — Before: single 'Add funds' CTA blocks access (bug). After: Long/Short CTAs remain available, matching the ticket's expected behavior.
before_after_pairs.note: Proves Matthieu's expected behavior: zero-balance users retain access to the trade screen; the Long/Short disable happens downstream on order-entry (AC1).

videos.note: Screen recording unavailable in this environment (macOS permissions). Screenshots provide sufficient proof.
